notes: Major update. Custom roles with granular permissions: an admin defines roles and picks exactly what each may do — which screens (dashboard/live/recordings/search/alarms/map), per-folder scope for live and recordings independently, export, walls, folder management, PTZ, bookmarks, camera-settings depth (view/edit/add), which settings categories, and administration. A user without a permission never sees that tab and cannot reach it via the API. AES-256 encrypted evidence exports (opt-in passphrase) plus a standalone decrypt tool; the Ed25519 signature still verifies the original. Saved walls and personal settings are now per-user. Reworked operator UI: design tokens, event bus, switchable video-wall layouts (1x1/1+5/2x2/3x3/4x4) that page instead of dropping cameras, a right-hand context panel, Smart Map workspace, favourite cameras, and a stronger password policy. Several performance passes so the live wall, alarm list and recordings page no longer re-render on background polls.
